nasb.text: “Behold, I will gather you to your fathers and you shall be gathered to your grave in peace, so your eyes will not see all the evil which I will bring on this place and on its inhabitants.” ’ ” And they brought back word to the king.

esv.text: Behold, I will gather you to your fathers, and you shall be gathered to your grave in peace, and your eyes shall not see all the disaster that I will bring upon this place and its inhabitants.’” And they brought back word to the king.

cnv.text: 我必使你歸到你的列祖那裡去，你必平平安安歸入你的墳墓。我所要降在這地方和這地上的居民身上的一切災禍，你必不會親眼看見。’”他們就把這番話回覆王去了。

ccb.text: 我会让你平安入土，你不会看到我要降给这地方及这里居民的一切灾难。’”他们便回去禀告王。
